title: The Crew Searches for Proof
description: On pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this part focuses on cricket and the dream of the sky. The Straw Hats meet people connected to Mont Blanc Noland’s legend and begin chasing the impossible route to the sky.
scene: This scene belongs to the Cricket and the Dream of the Sky sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Masira, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Look like? What, he ain't a monkey?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ohh! So you're from East Blue!?

dialogue.speaker: Jaya local
dialogue.text: Shucks, stop tryin' to Embar- Rass me!

summary: The Straw Hats meet people connected to Mont Blanc Noland’s legend and begin chasing the impossible route to the sky.
